pull_requests.title: Add partial like in item with variants
pull_requests.author: renaudjenny
pull_requests.body:
* Add an half star to show that the item has been partially completed, meaning at least one of its variants is liked, but not all of them.
* Display bottom sheet variations if the item has variants instead of adding it to the collection without their variants.
* Fix #230

pull_requests.title: Today dashboard: add today villager visits
pull_requests.author: renaudjenny
pull_requests.body:
Help you track visits of your residents. For example, you can offer them a gift a then validate that you did it.
Villagers are automatically added to this Today's Dashboard Widget when you add them as resident (by tapping the button Home on a villager detail view)
![Screenshot 2020-06-06 at 15 45 46](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2297556/83947124-08914200-a80d-11ea-87c1-14b5bd3776d2.png)
It's very (very) inspired from Today's Custom Task. For instance the Reset button do the same thing
![Screenshot 2020-06-06 at 15 45 53](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2297556/83947127-0d55f600-a80d-11ea-8dee-ea178fa3208c.png)
A long press will open the village detail view, very useful to know what gift will fit the best for them
![Screenshot 2020-06-06 at 15 46 06](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2297556/83947129-0fb85000-a80d-11ea-82fd-bd29760279a5.png)
